name: Ronin's Requiem
short_description: In Ronin's Requiem you play as a ninja who has fallen from grace and now, to regain his honor, he has to eliminate an army of demons in a foreign land. Ronin's Requiem is a fast-paced platformer with solid gameplay and fast-paced combat.
detailed_description:
A masterless ninja receives the last offer to regain his honor and be accepted among his peers: eliminate the demon wizard king from the lands of the distant west and conquer that territory for his former daimyo.

Characteristics:

8-bit pixel art graphics
original soundtrack
handmade levels
rewarding gameplay
miscellaneous collectibles

Controls:

keyboard:
movement - arrow keys
main attack - "X"
select sub weapon - space
sub weapon attack - "C"

gamepad:
movement - arrow keys or left analog stick
jump - "A"
main attack - "X"
select sub weapon - "Y" or right sholder button
sub weapon attack - "B"
